rules.description: Legacy title ≤200 chars (in force until Jul 27 2026 cutover)
Title ≤75 chars effective Jul 27 2026 (all categories except media); violators subject to AI auto-rewrite (14-day review window for Brand Registry owners)
Item Highlights ≤125 chars, searchable, effective Jul 27 2026; absorbs title overflow; may not be writable in all templates yet (seller-reported error 100476)
No word appears more than 2× in the title (brand counts; short prepositions/articles exempt)
Banned title characters: ! $ ? _ { } ^ ¬ ¦ ; avoid en dash (normalize to hyphen/comma)
Exactly 5 bullets for 3P sellers, ≤255 chars each
Description ≤2000 chars, plain text with blank-line paragraphs
Backend search terms: ≤249 UTF-8 BYTES saved (US); exceeding de-indexes the entire field; no brands/ASINs/disease terms; no title repeats
Main image: pure white RGB 255/255/255, product ≥85% of frame, longest side ≥1000px; regulated panels (Supplement Facts) must be real photographs
Premium A+: up to 7 modules, 1464px wide; Basic: 5 modules, 970px
No price/$ in A+/images; no unsubstantiated superlatives; no star/review claims; no urgency; no guarantees; no Buy Now / Subscribe & Save in A+
